spell.witcher_rpg.aard.description: Telekinetic thrust that knocks targets back and deals {damage} sign-damage around the caster.
spell.witcher_rpg.aard.name: Aard

spell.witcher_rpg.aard_far_reach.name: Far-Reaching Aard

spell.witcher_rpg.aard_frostbite.name: Frostbite
spell.witcher_rpg.aard_shockwave.descrip: Aard impacts now have a {trigger_chance} chance to stun the target.
spell.witcher_rpg.aard_shockwave.name: Shockwave
spell.witcher_rpg.aard_sweep.description: A 360 degree telekinetic blast dealing {damage} damage and knocking back all nearby enemies.
spell.witcher_rpg.aard_sweep.name: Aard Sweep
spell.witcher_rpg.aerondight_passive.des: Each hit deals bonus arcane damage and builds up charges, increasing damage.

spell.witcher_rpg.arrow_deflection.name: Arrow Deflection

spell.witcher_rpg.axii_domination.name: Domination

spell.witcher_rpg.axii_lethargy.name: Lethargy

spell.witcher_rpg.axii_link.name: Link

spell.witcher_rpg.axii_puppet.name: Axii Puppet

spell.witcher_rpg.battle_trance.name: Battle Trance

spell.witcher_rpg.fast_attack.name: Fast Attack
